description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the left side and a two-seat section on the right. The sofa features broad, rectangular armrests on both ends, providing a sturdy and geometric appearance. The backrest is composed of three large, uniform cushions that are slightly taller than the armrests, offering ample support. The seat cushions are thick and plush, with the chaise section extending forward for lounging. The upholstery is a solid, medium-gray fabric with a matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The base and legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design, contributing to a streamlined, contemporary look.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in solid gray fabric with broad armrests, plush seat and back cushions, and a chaise lounge extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, broad armrests, and the chaise lounge on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions and armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the two-seat section and the solid, rectangular armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform back cushions and two seat cushions, with an extended chaise section; all cushions appear attached and evenly aligned.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rectangular armrests on both ends, matching the height of the seat and backrest, with a straight, boxy profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, likely providing a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest composed of three large, uniform cushions; continuous and unsegmented with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
